source_pr.title: domain,owner: unify and normalize the format of the log
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Unify and normalize the format of the log in the pkg of domain and owner.

### What is changed and how it works?

Change `log "github.com/sirupsen/logrus"` to `github.com/pingcap/log`.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->


Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

fix_pattern: domain,owner: unify and normalize the format of the log

evidence: files: domain/domain.go, domain/info.go, domain/schema_validator.go, executor/show.go, expression/builtin_arithmetic.go, expression/integration_test.go, go.sum, infoschema/tables.go, owner/manager.go, planner/core/logical_plan_test.go, planner/core/planbuilder.go, types/etc_test.go, types/time.go, types/time_test.go, util/admin/admin.go, util/kvencoder/kv_encoder.go, util/memory/action.go, util/misc.go, util/printer/printer.go, util/processinfo.go, util/signal/signal_posix.go, util/signal/signal_windows.go, util/systimemon/systime_mon.go, util/timeutil/time.go
